entities.name: NITROUS OXIDE
entities.description: A greenhouse gas with considerable warming potential and involvement in the destruction of stratospheric ozone

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS
entities.description: Gases that trap heat in the atmosphere

entities.name: STRATOSPHERIC OZONE
entities.description: The ozone layer in the stratosphere that protects the Earth from ultraviolet radiation

entities.name: SAVANNAS
entities.description: Seasonally dry ecosystems covering over 95% of Zimbabwe's forest area

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LAND
entities.description: Land converted from savannas for farming purposes

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the study on nitrous oxide emissions is focused

entities.name: ACACIA
entities.description: One of the five woodland types found in Zimbabwe's savannas

entities.name: MIOMBO
entities.description: One of the five woodland types found in Zimbabwe's savannas

entities.name: MOPANE
entities.description: One of the five woodland types found in Zimbabwe's savannas

entities.name: TEAK
entities.description: Baikiaea Plurijuga, one of the five woodland types found in Zimbabwe's savannas

entities.name: TERMINALIA-COMBRETACEAE
entities.description: One of the five woodland types found in Zimbabwe's savannas

entities.name: LAND-USE CHANGES
entities.description: The modification of land use, such as conversion of savannas to agricultural land or grasslands

entities.name: LAND MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Human activities used to manage land that affect gas emissions

entities.name: GRASSLANDS
entities.description: Ecosystems characterized by grasses, often resulting from land-use change

entities.name: ARABLE LAND
entities.description: Cultivated and fallow land suitable for growing crops

entities.name: WET SEASON
entities.description: The period characterized by high soil moisture that enhances N2O production

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The amount of water held in the soil, which strongly enhances N2O production

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The period during which pyrogenic emissions are important sources of N2O

entities.name: PYROGENIC EMISSIONS
entities.description: Emissions resulting from the combustion of organic matter

entities.name: BIOMASS BURNING
entities.description: The combustion of organic matter, acting as a form of land-use change and a source of N2O

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of farming that results in immediate increases in N2O emissions when replacing savannas
